briefdescription.para: Searching for the required EEPROM Address and user can also add their own EEPROM Address in the below array list.
This table contains configuration information for each IIC device in the system.
This function writes, reads, and verifies the data to the IIC EEPROM.

detaileddescription.para: It does the write as a single page write, performs a buffered read.

briefdescription.para: This function writes a buffer of data to the IIC serial EEPROM.

parameterdescription.para: contains the number of bytes in the buffer to be written.

simplesect.para: The Byte count should not exceed the page size of the EEPROM as noted by the constant PAGE_SIZE.

briefdescription.para: This function reads data from the IIC serial EEPROM into a specified buffer.

parameterdescription.para: contains the address of the data buffer to be filled.
contains the number of bytes in the buffer to be read.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the availability of a slave using slave monitor mode.

parameterdescription.para: is the Device ID of the IicPs Device and is the XPAR_<IICPS_instance>_DEVICE_ID value from xparameters.h

briefdescription.para: This function perform the initial configuration for the IICPS Device.
This function is use to figure out the slave device is alive or not.
This function initializes the IIC MUX to select the required channel.
This function checks the availability of EEPROM using slave monitor mode.
This function is use to figure out the Eeprom slave device.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful and also update the epprom slave device address in addr variable else XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to figure out page size Eeprom slave device.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful and also update the epprom slave device pagesize else XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the Iic EEPROM polled example.
This file consists of a polled mode design example which uses the Xilinx PS IIC device and XIicPs driver to exercise the EEPROM.

detaileddescription.para: This example runs on zynqmp evaluation board (zcu102).
The XIicPs_MasterSendPolled() API is used to transmit the data and XIicPs_MasterRecvPolled() API is used to receive the data.
The example is tested with a 2Kb/8Kb serial IIC EEPROM (ST M24C02/M24C08). The WP pin of this EEPROM is hardwired to ground in the HW in which this was tested.
The AddressType should be u8 as the address pointer in the on-board EEPROM is 1 bytes.
This code assumes that no Operating System is being used.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a sdm 03/15/10 First release 1.01a sg 04/13/12 Added MuxInit function for initializing the IIC Mux on the ZC702 board and to configure it for accessing the IIC EEPROM. Updated to use usleep instead of delay loop 1.04a hk 09/03/13 Removed GPIO code to pull MUX out of reset - CR#722425. 2.3 sk 10/07/14 Removed multiple initializations for read buffer. 3.3 Nava 08/08/16 Adopt the Dynamic EEPROM finding support. 3.11 rna 10/16/19 Added support for 64 page size eeproms on Versal based boards, scanning for eeprom until found on all I2C instances rna 03/26/20 Eeprom page size detection support is added. 3.18 gm 07/14/23 Added SDT support. 3.22 bkv 07/09/25 Fixed GCC Warning.
